description: Source-evidenced V2 dungeon-view manifest bindings for pass271. These entries bind shared logical IDs to ReDMCSB wall/floor/ceiling/door/stairs source contracts; they do not claim final rebuilt art acceptance.

sourceReference.origin: ReDMCSB DM1 dungeon-view wall-set graphics and center wall blit route

sourceEvidence.assertion: The PC34/I34E wall set enumerates center wall graphics C097/C102/C107 and neighboring D0-D3 wall planes from M646_GRAPHIC_FIRST_WALL_SET.
Wall-set bitmaps are blitted into G0296_puc_Bitmap_Viewport through the viewport wall frame contract.
The main draw route walks D3 side/center squares before nearer rows, binding wall planes to relative dungeon composition rather than a standalone art guess.

notes: Source-evidenced binding only; final rebuilt wall artwork/capture acceptance remains a later gate.

sourceReference.origin: ReDMCSB DM1 D0-D3 side wall graphic constants and horizontal flip route

sourceEvidence.assertion: The wall-set includes D0/D1/D2/D3 side wall graphics and left/right variants used by side-lane viewport composition.
The draw setup chooses flipped wall/floor/ceiling bitmaps from party position parity before composing side lanes.
The viewport draw order explicitly draws relative D3 left and right squares as side-lane composition inputs.

notes: Source-evidenced binding only; final side-wall art/capture acceptance remains a later gate.

sourceReference.origin: ReDMCSB DM1 floor set loader and 224x70 floor band draw route

sourceEvidence.assertion: M650_GRAPHIC_FLOOR_SET_0_FLOOR identifies the floor asset paired with its ceiling in the current floor set.
The floor set loader resolves the floor-set graphic index and loads the floor bitmap and ceiling bitmap as a pair.
The floor draw route copies/draws the floor band into the viewport floor area and marks the floor/ceiling redraw request complete.

notes: Source-evidenced binding only; final floor material/capture acceptance remains a later gate.

sourceReference.origin: ReDMCSB DM1 floor set loader and 224x29 ceiling band draw route

sourceEvidence.assertion: M651_GRAPHIC_FLOOR_SET_0_CEILING identifies the ceiling asset paired with the floor in the current floor set.
The floor set loader resolves the floor-set graphic index and loads the floor bitmap and ceiling bitmap as a pair.
The ceiling draw route copies/draws the ceiling band into the top of the 224-wide viewport before wall composition.

notes: Source-evidenced binding only; final ceiling material/capture acceptance remains a later gate.

sourceReference.origin: ReDMCSB DM1 door set and closed/destroyed door draw route

sourceEvidence.assertion: M633_GRAPHIC_FIRST_DOOR_SET anchors the door family graphics after the stairs range in PC34/I34E.
Door bitmaps are blitted from the temporary door bitmap into the viewport using door frame coordinates.
The door draw route copies the typed door bitmap, applies ornaments/animation, then draws ClosedOrDestroyed for C4_DOOR_STATE_CLOSED.

notes: Source-evidenced binding only; final door art/capture acceptance remains a later gate.

sourceReference.origin: ReDMCSB DM1 stairs graphic range and down-stairs bitmap indices

sourceEvidence.function: stairs graphic count and down-stairs bitmap constants
sourceEvidence.assertion: The stairs graphic count and down-stairs front/side bitmap ordinal constants define the down-stairs visual family.
The viewport loader maps the stairs native bitmap sequence, including Down_Front and Down_Side variants, from the current wall-set graphic range.
Floor-pit/stairs bitmaps are drawn through the viewport bitmap route with source frame/zone coordinates.

notes: Source-evidenced binding only; final stairs art/capture acceptance remains a later gate.
